reviews.review_description: Nocturne offers an electronic instrument that digitally simulates traditional instruments. It has excellent physics, visuals and options. I am learning to love it like my trumpet.

>Want 25% off? Use my link below:

https://www.oculus. com/appreferrals/CloudTurtle27/3618101344910000/?utm_source=2

Steps: Copy+paste the link above > remove space between . and com >enjoy your 25% off =)
-----------

Nocturne is definitely and interesting way to make music that has to be experienced first hand to truly appreciate.

reviews.review_title: Fun way to create music or just play!
reviews.review_description: Nocturne gives me a totally immersive, new way to  compose… to improvise layered soundscapes. It’s also fun to play along with the song book… to see if I can hit the notes on time and in tune when they appear. I especially like the wide range  of settings available to change the sound.   Mesmerizing!

￼ Nocturne ￼ is an excellent and unique virtual instrument. It’s extremely flexible, very fun and creates an environment that feels very meditative to me. Can’t wait to see what Outpost4 does with it.￼
This is a fun and well polished VR musical instrument. It has lots of potential (including new sounds/instruments). It's a more intuitive theremin, you improved the theremin. Love it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your warm feedback! It means a lot to our team. If you have any additional suggestions or feature requests, don't hesitate to join our discord (https://discord.gg/JGTuZcK7au).

reviews.review_description: I have a (real) theremin and enjoy playing it – but it is hard. I was impressed and pleasantly surprised how rewarding it was to play this VR instrument. I might even record myself playing and then see if I can play along with my theremin later on! Well done.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words! If you do record yourself with your theremin, don't hesitate to join our discord and share (https://discord.gg/JGTuZcK7au).
